title: Villagers stay still
description: Now the villagers can stay still
body:
## How to Use

<details>
<summary>Video Tutorial</summary>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZH1dPxFptEU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

Use an anvil to rename **any** item in the game to `still`.  
Hold the renamed item and approach a villager. The villager will now be unable to move.

If you want the villager to move again, rename **any** item in the game to `move`.  
Hold the renamed item and approach the villager. The villager will regain movement.

## Notes
- This does not work with wandering traders or zombie villagers.
- If a villager transforms in zombie villager, the zombie villager will be able to move.
